# Promptaholics

> Promptaholics.com is a free AI prompt library with 1,671+ curated prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Flux, Kling, and other AI tools. No signup required. No paywall. Built for creators, marketers, developers, and anyone who wants better AI outputs.

Promptaholics is a solo-built, community-driven platform that helps people get dramatically better results from AI tools through structured, tested prompts. The library covers 18 categories including Business & Marketing, Writing & Content, Code & Tech, Image Generation, Video & Film, AI Agents, Finance, Legal, Health, and more. Every prompt is free to copy and use immediately.

The site also includes a Prompt Builder (9 frameworks including CoSTAR, RISEN, CRISPE, Chain-of-Thought), a Creation Station for AI image and video generation, an Image Vault for community-submitted AI art, a free AI course, and ARIA — an AI-powered agent hub for managing the platform.

Promptaholics launched on Product Hunt in June 2026 and is growing toward 2,000+ prompts via a self-growing pipeline where users submit prompts through the PA Agent, an admin reviews and approves them, and a GitHub Action auto-exports them to the live library every Monday.

## Core Pages

- [Prompt Library](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): 1,671+ free AI prompts across 18 categories and 6 tools. Filter by tool, category, or keyword. No account needed.
- [Prompt Builder](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): AI-powered prompt writer with 9 frameworks — CoSTAR, RISEN, CRISPE, RTF, Chain-of-Thought, and more. Generates structured prompts from plain English descriptions.
- [PA Agent](https://promptaholics.com/agent.html): 5-mode AI agent — Find Prompts, Create Content, Image Prompts, Full Campaign, Write Me a Prompt. Powered by Claude Sonnet via Cloudflare Worker.
- [Creation Station](https://promptaholics.com/creationstation.html): AI image and video generation hub using Midjourney, Flux, Kling, and other tools.
- [Image Vault](https://promptaholics.com/vault.html): Community gallery of AI-generated images. Users submit, like, and browse AI art.
- [Learn](https://promptaholics.com/learn.html): Free prompt engineering course covering frameworks, techniques, and best practices.
- [Prompt of the Day](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-of-the-day.html): Daily featured prompt with explanation and use case.
- [ARIA Hub](https://promptaholics.com/agent-hub.html): AI agent hub with 4 active agents — Vault & Approvals, Social Media, Tech & Site Ops, and Browser Agent. Includes voice control, Firebase persistent memory, and web automation via agent-browser CLI.
- [Best Claude Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/best-claude-prompts.html): Curated collection of the highest-performing prompts specifically optimized for Claude.
- [Store](https://promptaholics.com/store.html): Prompt packs ($5), eBooks ($5), bundles ($15), and custom AI-art apparel via Printful.

## Prompt Categories

- [Business & Marketing Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Copywriting, ads, email campaigns, brand voice, social media strategy.
- [Writing & Content Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Blog posts, storytelling, editing, SEO content, newsletters.
- [Code & Tech Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Debugging, code review, documentation, architecture, explainers.
- [AI Agents Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Autonomous task prompts, agent workflows, multi-step instructions.
- [Image Generation Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Midjourney, Flux, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion style prompts.
- [Video & Film Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Kling, Runway, Sora-style video generation prompts.
- [Finance & Learning Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Financial analysis, investment research, learning acceleration.
- [Email Sales & Communication Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Cold email, follow-up sequences, negotiation, outreach.
- [Productivity Systems & Agents Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/library.html): Task management, planning, automation, workflow design.

## Prompt Frameworks

- [CoSTAR Framework](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): Context, Objective, Style, Tone, Audience, Response — most consistent cross-model framework.
- [RISEN Framework](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): Role, Instructions, Steps, End Goal, Narrowing — best for constraint-heavy tasks.
- [CRISPE Framework](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): Capacity, Role, Insight, Statement, Personality, Experiment — expert-level analysis.
- [Chain-of-Thought](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): Forces step-by-step reasoning before final answer. Massively improves accuracy on complex tasks.
- [RTF Framework](https://promptaholics.com/prompt-builder.html): Role, Task, Format — fast and effective for structured outputs.

## Tools Covered

- ChatGPT (OpenAI GPT-4o and later)
- Claude (Anthropic — Claude Sonnet and Haiku)
- Midjourney (image generation)
- Flux (image generation)
- Kling (video generation)
- Gemini (Google)
- Other general-purpose tools

## About

- [Privacy Policy](https://promptaholics.com/privacy.html): Data handling, cookies, and user rights.
- Built by: FinBot (solo developer), admin email promptaholics1@gmail.com
- Hosting: Netlify, GitHub repo finbot010/promptaholics
- AI infrastructure: Cloudflare Worker routing to Claude Sonnet (content) and Gemini Flash (search/find)
- Database: Firebase Firestore (promptaholics-534d3)
- Images: Cloudinary (dgqbzarfw)
- Analytics: GA4 (G-DRW8ZNX921)
- Monetization: Google AdSense (ca-pub-1731098620016005), digital product store, custom apparel

## Optional

- [Admin Prompts](https://promptaholics.com/admin-prompts.html): Internal approval queue for community-submitted prompts. Admin access only.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/finbot010/promptaholics): Source code for the full Promptaholics platform.
